semantic.role: Defines AST extraction patterns for the Go programming language within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Specifies import pattern recognition for Go single and grouped imports.
Specifies export pattern recognition for Go functions, structs, interfaces, type aliases, variables, and constants.
Specifies usage pattern recognition for Go function calls and field/method selectors.
outOfScope: Does not cover other programming languages.
Does not include patterns for error handling or control flow.
Does not define architectural rules or governance policies.

English.purpose: This document provides a set of pattern definitions used by the ArchSpine system's AST extractor to identify imports, exports, and usages in Go source code.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and AI agents maintaining the ArchSpine system, specifically those working on language-specific AST extraction rules for Go. It serves as a reference for the patterns that govern how Go code symbols are discovered and tracked.
key_takeaways: The document contains pattern-matching rules for imports, exports, and usages.
Imports can be single or grouped.
Exports include functions, structs, interfaces, type aliases, variables, and constants.
Usages include function calls and selector expressions.
